summary: AI Software Engineer and Full-Stack Developer with 5+ years of experience building scalable web applications and AI-powered systems. Experienced in developing LLM and Generative AI-powered applications, leveraging Python, FastAPI, React, and PostgreSQL. Strong background in REST APIs, containerized architectures, and cloud-ready backend systems.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Developed AI-powered collaboration tools integrating LLMs into productivity workflows, improving team efficiency and automating repetitive tasks
Built an AI collaborative chat platform using Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, and React
Developed an AI email automation system capable of analyzing, categorizing, and drafting responses to incoming messages
Created a browser extension integrating LLM capabilities into web workflows
Designed backend APIs for AI interaction pipelines using FastAPI and SQLAlchemy
Integrated generative AI models via OpenAI and DeepSeek APIs
Containerized services using Docker for scalable deployment

bullets: Built full-stack web applications across a 3-month intensive program
